meta.name: Bravada
meta.description: A faithful port of the Bravada WordPress theme (Cryout Creations): static slider, icon blocks, featured boxes, text areas, portfolio, testimonials and a masonry blog feed, rebuilt as EmDash sections over a magazine-style blog.
meta.author: vhs

This site is a port of the Bravada WordPress theme by Cryout Creations, rebuilt for EmDash. Every band on the landing page is an editable section — open the Home page in the admin and rearrange, reword or remove any of them.
935 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW Washington, D.C. 20535-0001
E-mail: william@spooky.fox · Opening Hours: 07:00 – 21:30
